allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ps aux | grep -iE 'apt|dpkg|docker|curl|wget' | grep -v grep")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "cat /var/log/apt/term.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30; echo ---HISTORY---; cat /var/log/dpkg.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker version 2>&1; echo '---groups---'; groups; echo '---id---'; id")
